name: Better Than Sex Cake II
recipeInstructions:
1. Either bake the German chocolate cake according to the directions on the German chocolate package or from the mix.
2. Bake in a 9 x 13 pan.
3. Cool for 5-10 minutes.
4. Using the end of a wooden spoon, poke holes in the cake every half to one inch.
5. Allow it to cool for another 20 minutes.
6. Drizzle sweetened condensed milk and butterscotch topping into the holes (some will land on top of the cake).
7. Sprinkle crushed Heath bars over the top.
8. Serve with whipped cream or topping.
